pages.title: Gunsmith
pages.text: Firearms. Five items, hard recipes. None of these guns has a recipe in the source mod — the Gunsmith class is the only crafting path.$(br2)Theme is 19th-century — iron-block barrels and breeches, a powder seat.

pages.title: Weapons and ammo
pages.text: $(bold)Pistol.$(/) Flintlock, iron-block breech.$(br2)$(bold)Musket.$(/) Long iron-block barrel.$(br2)$(bold)Blunderbuss.$(/) Flared bore.$(br2)$(bold)Cartridge.$(/) Paper-wrapped powder and iron-nugget shot. Yields 4.

pages.title: Upgrade template
pages.text: $(bold)Musket Upgrade Smithing Template.$(/) Gilded etched template on an iron-block die.$(br2)Used at a smithing table to upgrade a musket into the Bayonet or Scope variant. The upgraded variants are smithing-only — they are not class-crafted.$(br2)Matching trader: the Arms Merchant. The Pistol is also cheaper at the Pirate trader.
